message:
fix(python): self-loop degree counting matches NetworkX convention

Self-loops contribute 2 to degree in undirected graphs (NetworkX
convention). Previously, Graph.degree and MultiGraph.degree counted
self-loops as 1.

- Add Graph.degree() method that accounts for self-loops
- Fix MultiGraph.degree() to double-count self-loop keys
- Update DegreeView to use degree() instead of neighbor_count()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
